data.body: SIZE HANDLING LOCKED (Joe): NEVER chunk ticket content. Order = batch criteria per config -> ONE criterion/call (full content) -> escalate higher-context model -> if still too big: FAILURE FINDING 'ticket too big, reduce it' (extreme of P4/G5). Container coverage (G3/G4) = parent + ONE child at a time; too-big (parent+child) pairing -> same too-big failure finding. ISF: if the linked session log is too big even after escalation, SUMMARIZE it (supporting context only, never the plan) and run ISF on the summary with REDUCED CONFIDENCE + record that a summary was used. Removed section-chunk + INDETERMINATE-for-size. Applied: ca03 rewrite, ISF descriptor (criteria_v8), gate_lib helper docs. Guard passes. Committed.
